text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, November 04. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Planning for future education costs. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. CareConnect prep is moving along. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
